test.note: Focused tests pass; full suite has pre-existing baseline issues per mission.md

blockingIssues.description: MCP provenance gap: MCP tool calls use CreatedBy: "mcp" which maps to ActorWorker via actorFromCreatedBy(). When the supervisor calls MCP tools to mutate work state, resulting events have Actor: ActorWorker instead of Actor: ActorSupervisor. This violates VAL-SUPERVISOR-003 requiring 'wake-relevant events carry trustworthy provenance' across CLI, HTTP, and MCP transport boundaries.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Either: (1) Add context to MCP tools to pass the caller's session identity so work_update can set CreatedBy correctly, or (2) Add "mcp" case to actorFromCreatedBy() that resolves to ActorSupervisor when appropriate, or (3) Have MCP tools invoked by the supervisor explicitly set CreatedBy: "supervisor".

nonBlockingIssues.description: filterNovelEvents uses only (WorkID, State) pairs for echo filtering. Could theoretically suppress legitimate external events with same transition, though mitigated by single-worker-per-item normal operation.
TestWaitForSignalBurstBatching and TestClassifyOutcome are placeholder tests that don't actually test burst batching or classification behavior.
The 10-second backoff for idle suppression is hardcoded. Consider making configurable or using exponential backoff for extended idle periods.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Event Provenance section documenting CreatedBy canonical values and MCP provenance gap; added Supervisor Wake Semantics section documenting seen-set, idle suppression, burst batching, and wake triggers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary: When implementing provenance or event-tracking, workers must verify correct Actor/CreatedBy values across ALL transport boundaries (CLI, HTTP, MCP), not just the primary code path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: supervisor-event-provenance-and-wake-gate implemented seen-set correctly but missed MCP provenance mapping. The CreatedBy: 'mcp' -> ActorWorker mapping breaks supervisor self-wake detection for MCP-originated mutations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: control-plane-worker skill should remind workers to check provenance fields across all transport boundaries when implementing wake/event semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker followed skill procedure for tests but tests only covered filtering mechanism, not provenance source correctness for MCP-originated events.
